originalTitle: Lamine Yamal celebrates World Cup win with little brother who charmed fans
summary: The three-year-old brother of Yamal has been hailed one of Spain's World Cup breakout stars by fans
content:
Spanish footballer Lamine Yamal may have lifted the World Cup but it is his little brother Keyne who appears to have stolen the spotlight.

The three-year-old quickly become an internet sensation after footage of his exuberant celebrations following Spain's 1-0 victory over Argentina spread across social media on Sunday.

While the footballer, just 19 himself, continued his rise by helping Spain achieve football's biggest prize, attention swiftly turned to his younger brother's joyful reactions from the sidelines.

From sticking out his tongue on the big screen to wildly cheering on his older brother, Keyne has been hailed by fans as one of the unexpected breakout stars of the 2026 tournament.

Lamine Yamal's little brother steals the show at full time

Spain triumphed in a battle of endurance, beating Argentina with a goal in the 106th minute at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

The team's second World Cup win has led to Lamine Yamal becoming the youngest player ever to win both the European Championship and the World Cup.

His younger brother Keyne has become a regular fixture both on and off the pitch - often featuring in Lamine Yamal's TikToks and charming fans from around the world.

The three-year-old, who appears keen to follow in his big brother's footsteps, is the son of Lamine Yamal's mother Sheila Ebana.

Speaking about Keyne, Lamine Yamal previously told outlets: "I'm moved when I see my little brother this happy, as well as seeing my mum and friends living the life they always dreamed of.

"My little brother means everything to me. I am in love with him; it feels like he is my son."

Keyne lies on the ground surrounded by golden confetti

Keyne smiles as he is handed a hat by a policeman

In what could be seen as a symbolic passing of the torch, Lamine Yamal went head to head with Argentinan football legend Lionel Messi for the first time during the World Cup final.

The two had crossed paths years earlier in 2007 when Messi, then 20, was seen cradling and bathing a tiny baby boy - Lamine Yamal - after his mother won a competition to meet a Barcelona first-team player.

Days ahead of Sunday's final, Messi, now 39, described Lamine Yamal as "one of the best" footballers right now.

"He's a tremendous player - a global star. He's 19 years old and has his whole career ahead of him. I wish him the best, but we'll give it our all to ensure he doesn't become champion this time," he added.

As the full-time whistle blew, cementing Spain's victory, the pair could be seen embracing on the pitch.

chineseTitle: 拉明·亚马尔与迷倒球迷的弟弟一起庆祝世界杯胜利
chineseSummary: 亚马尔三岁弟弟被球迷誉为西班牙世界杯新星之一
chineseContent:
西班牙足球运动员拉明·亚马尔可能举起了世界杯冠军，但抢尽风头的却是他的弟弟凯恩。

周日，西班牙1-0战胜阿根廷后，这位三岁小伙子的精彩庆祝视频在社交媒体上传播开来，迅速成为网络红人。

当这位年仅 19 岁的足球运动员通过帮助西班牙获得足球界最高奖项而继续崛起时，人们的注意力很快转向了他弟弟在场边的快乐反应。

从在大屏幕上吐舌头到为哥哥疯狂欢呼，凯恩被球迷誉为 2026 年锦标赛中意想不到的突破明星之一。

拉明·亚马尔的弟弟全职抢尽风头

西班牙在一场耐力战中取得胜利，在纽约新泽西体育场第106分钟进球击败阿根廷。

球队第二次夺得世界杯冠军，拉明·亚马尔成为有史以来同时赢得欧洲杯和世界杯的最年轻球员。

他的弟弟凯恩已成为球场内外的常客，经常出现在拉明·亚马尔的 TikTok 视频中，吸引了来自世界各地的球迷。

这个三岁的孩子似乎热衷于追随哥哥的脚步，他是拉明·亚马尔 (Lamine Yamal) 母亲希拉·埃巴纳 (Sheila Ebana) 的儿子。

谈到凯恩，拉明·亚马尔此前告诉媒体：“当我看到我的弟弟如此快乐，以及看到我的妈妈和朋友过着他们一直梦想的生活时，我很感动。

“我的弟弟对我来说意味着一切。我爱上了他；感觉就像他是我的儿子。”

凯恩躺在地上，周围环绕着金色五彩纸屑

当警察递给凯恩一顶帽子时，凯恩微笑着

拉明·亚马尔在世界杯决赛中首次与阿根廷足球传奇人物莱昂内尔·梅西正面交锋，这可以被视为象征性的火炬传递。

两人早在2007年就曾有过交集，当时20岁的梅西的母亲赢得了一场与巴塞罗那一线队球员会面的比赛，当时20岁的梅西正抱着一个小男婴拉明·亚马尔(Lamine Yamal)洗澡。

在周日决赛前几天，现年 39 岁的梅西将拉明·亚马尔描述为目前“最好的”足球运动员之一。

“他是一位出色的球员，一位全球明星。他今年 19 岁，他的整个职业生涯都在等着他。我祝他一切顺利，但我们会全力以赴，确保他这次不会成为冠军，”他补充道。

随着终场哨声响起，西班牙队锁定了胜利，可以看到两人在球场上拥抱。
